S.FORM: Joe Binion 3 bulad 26 demiad, 1961 a mihca, Joe Binion, miunduay.
S.PHON: *o~uə b~b~vinio~un * b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ɬ~ɮəmiaɬ~ɮ, **** a miħʦa, *o~uə b~b~vinio~un, mio~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~uaj.
